name: HRT_POOLS_VL
query: SELECT PL.POOL_ID, PL.ENTERPRISE_ID, PL.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID, PL.DEPARTMENT_ID, PL.POSITION_ID, PL.GRADE_ID, PL.JOB_ID, PL.JOB_FAMILY_ID, PL.JOB_PROFILE_ID, PL.POOL_TYPE_CODE, PLT.POOL_NAME, PLT.DESCRIPTION, PL.STATUS, PL.PRIVATE_FLAG, PL.OWNER_EDIT_FLAG, PL.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, PL.CREATED_BY, PL.CREATION_DATE, PL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, PL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, PL.SOURCE_CODE, PL.SOURCE_KEY, PL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, PL.ATTRIBUTE1, PL.ATTRIBUTE2, PL.ATTRIBUTE3, PL.ATTRIBUTE4, PL.ATTRIBUTE5, PL.ATTRIBUTE6, PL.ATTRIBUTE7, PL.ATTRIBUTE8, PL.ATTRIBUTE9, PL.ATTRIBUTE10, PL.ATTRIBUTE11, PL.ATTRIBUTE12, PL.ATTRIBUTE13, PL.ATTRIBUTE14, PL.ATTRIBUTE15, PL.ATTRIBUTE16, PL.ATTRIBUTE17, PL.ATTRIBUTE18, PL.ATTRIBUTE19, PL.ATTRIBUTE20, PL.ATTRIBUTE21, PL.ATTRIBUTE22, PL.ATTRIBUTE23, PL.ATTRIBUTE24, PL.ATTRIBUTE25, PL.ATTRIBUTE26, PL.ATTRIBUTE27, PL.ATTRIBUTE28, PL.ATTRIBUTE29, PL.ATTRIBUTE30, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, PL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, PL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE15 FROM HRT_POOLS_B PL, HRT_POOLS_TL PLT WHERE PL.POOL_ID = PLT.POOL_ID AND PLT.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
